questions.correctText: It provides evidence students must use before deciding.
choices: It only matters if it repeats the vocabulary word.
It provides evidence students must use before deciding.
using a rule from a different unit
memorizing an isolated fact without evidence
questions.explanation: The text excerpt is part of the task. Students should read it for evidence, patterns, constraints, or context before selecting an answer.
